title: aloe ballii var. ballii
intro: Aloe ballii var. ballii, also known as the dwarf aloe, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Aloe genus and native to the southwestern United States. The leaves of the Aloe ballii var. ballii plant contain medicinal properties, particularly in its gel, which has anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, making it effective in treating burns, wounds, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from sunburn and other skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Aloe ballii var. ballii include topical applications of the gel, which can be used fresh or in the form of creams, ointments, or gels.
